name: workglow
description: Workglow is a tool for building and running DAG pipelines.

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules packages/*/*tsbuildinfo packages/*/dist packages/*/src/**/*\.d\.ts packages/*/src/**/*\.map examples/*/node_modules examples/*/dist examples/*/src/**/*\.d\.ts examples/*/src/**/*\.map .turbo */*/.turbo
scripts.watch: turbo run build-package --force && turbo run watch --concurrency 15
scripts.watch:js: turbo run build-package --force --ui=stream && turbo run watch-js --concurrency 15 --ui=stream
scripts.watch:packages: concurrently --kill-others -c 'auto' -n sqlite,util,storage,job-queue,task-graph,tasks,ai,provider,test,workflow 'cd packages/sqlite && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/util && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/storage && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/job-queue && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/task-graph && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/tasks && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/ai && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/ai-provider && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/test && pnpm run watch' 'cd packages/workflow && pnpm run watch'
scripts.publish-all: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run publish-login && pnpm run publish-workspaces
